description: deck board replacement, stair repair, railing repair, soft spot repairs, structural checks, and safer outdoor living repairs
summary: We fix the deck problems that make homeowners stop using the space: soft boards, shaky railings, tired stairs, and repair-or-replace decisions.
bullets: Free written estimate before work begins

faq.q: Can you repair part of a deck instead of replacing the whole thing?
faq.a: Yes. If the frame is solid, All-Pro can replace damaged boards, stairs, railings, and unsafe sections without rebuilding the entire deck.

faq.q: Do you repair railings and stairs?
faq.a: Yes. Loose railings, weak stairs, soft spots, and worn deck sections are common repair calls.

faq.q: Do you offer free deck repair estimates?
faq.a: Yes. Call 618-581-0676 and Bill can schedule a free written estimate.

description: wood fence repair, vinyl fence installation, chain link fence repair, gate repair, and residential fencing
summary: We handle the fence jobs homeowners actually need help with: storm damage, leaning posts, gate problems, privacy fixes, and replacement planning.

faq.a: Yes. All-Pro can repair leaning gates, damaged posts, loose sections, and storm-damaged fencing.

faq.q: Can you handle small fence repairs?
faq.a: Yes. Small jobs are welcome, including gate fixes, post replacement, and partial fence repairs.

faq.q: Can you quote new fence installation too?
faq.a: Yes. We can quote both repair work and full replacement depending on the condition and the homeowner's goal.

description: yard cleanup, mulch, rock, trimming, bed edging, brush removal, plantings, and curb appeal improvements
summary: We help homeowners reset the outside of the property so it looks maintained again without overcomplicating the project.
bullets: Brush removal and curb appeal resets

faq.q: Do you handle one-time yard cleanups?
faq.a: Yes. All-Pro handles one-time cleanups, overgrowth cleanup, brush removal, trimming, and seasonal yard projects.

faq.q: Do you install mulch and decorative rock?
faq.a: Yes. All-Pro can install mulch, rock, edging, and clean up existing landscape beds.

faq.q: Can landscaping be bundled with pressure washing or cleanup work?
faq.a: Yes. A lot of curb-appeal jobs combine landscaping, cleanup, and exterior washing into one clearer project plan.

description: driveway washing, patio cleaning, sidewalk cleaning, deck washing, fence washing, and exterior surface cleanup
summary: We clean the outside surfaces that make the property look older than it is: dirty concrete, stained patios, weathered fences, and slick walkways.
bullets: Free estimate before the cleaning starts

faq.q: What surfaces can you pressure wash?
faq.a: All-Pro can pressure wash driveways, patios, sidewalks, decks, fences, siding, and other exterior surfaces.

faq.q: Do you offer pressure washing with other services?
faq.a: Yes. Pressure washing can be combined with landscaping, deck repair, fence repair, and exterior cleanup projects.

faq.q: Is this just for big jobs?
faq.a: No. Many calls are simple driveway, patio, and exterior cleanup jobs that homeowners want done fast and clean.

description: brush cleanup, storm cleanup, bed cleanup, hauling, trimming, and property refresh work
summary: We help homeowners get control back over overgrown yards, storm mess, neglected beds, and outside cleanup that keeps getting pushed off.

faq.a: Yes. We help with brush, bed cleanup, trimming, debris, and yard areas that have gotten away from the homeowner.

faq.q: Can you clean up after storms?
faq.a: Yes. Storm cleanup and debris removal are common calls, especially when the yard needs to be made usable again quickly.

faq.q: How do I get an estimate?
faq.a: Call 618-581-0676 or use the online quote form and Bill will follow up with a written next-step estimate.

description: small home repairs, exterior fixes, trim repairs, hauling, cleanup, and general home improvement help
summary: We handle the smaller repair list that still matters: outside fixes, punch-list work, trim repairs, cleanup, and odd jobs homeowners need finished.

faq.q: Do you take small handyman jobs?
faq.a: Yes. All-Pro welcomes small jobs, including exterior repairs, cleanup, trim fixes, hauling, and general repair work.

faq.q: Can I give you a list of repairs?
faq.a: Yes. Send the list, and Bill can review it and give practical options for getting the work done.

faq.q: Is this a good fit if I have several little projects?
faq.a: Yes. Bundling several small repairs into one visit is often the smartest way to get the list knocked out.
